title: Los Amongus
description: Modpack centered around Create and other steam punk tech mods with added support for VR
body:
Modpack centered around **Create** and other **steam punk and tech** mods with added **support for VR**

# Featured mods:
* Create
* Applied Energistics 2
* Vivecraft
* Immersive engineering


DynamicTreesTerralith-1.20.1-1.2.4.jar optained from [github.com](https://github.com/DynamicTreesTeam/DynamicTrees-Terralith/tree/1.20.1) can also be optained from [www.curseforge.com](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-terralith)
